module:
Token-based chunking strategy.

This module provides a simple token-based chunking strategy that
divides text based on token count without respect to semantic boundaries.

TokenChunkingStrategy.docstring:
Strategy that chunks text based on token count.
    
    This is the simplest chunking approach that divides text
    purely based on token limits without considering linguistic
    or semantic boundaries.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the token chunking strategy.
        
        Args:
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk
            **kwargs: Additional configuration options

chunk_text.docstring:
Divide text into chunks based on token count.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to chunk
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (overrides instance setting)
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries
